app_slider.title: More Manacore Apps
app_slider.memoro_long_desc: Transform your voice into organized, actionable insights with AI-powered transcription and analysis. Perfect for capturing ideas on the go.
app_slider.maerchenzauber_long_desc: Create personalized bedtime stories for your children with AI. Spark imagination and make every night magical with unique narratives.
app_slider.cards_long_desc: Create and learn with smart flashcards and AI-powered spaced repetition.
app_slider.picture_long_desc: Create stunning images with AI. Transform your ideas into visual artwork in seconds.
app_slider.moodlit_long_desc: Track and understand your emotions with AI-powered insights. Build emotional awareness and improve your mental wellbeing.
app_slider.manacore_long_desc: The central hub for all Manacore apps. Manage your subscriptions, sync data, and access powerful AI tools from one place.
